heading: Step 2: Click the  tab.
body:
The **Monitoring** tab displays a variety of runtime
statistics about a stream processor of your choosing, including, but
not limited to:

- Number of messages ingested

- Number of messages successfully processed

- Number of messages sent to your [Dead Letter Queue](atlas-sp-dlq)

If your source connection is [Apache Kafka](https://kafka.apache.org/), you can monitor the
lag between the current offset and the latest offset at the broker for a topic's
partition and the sum of all the partition lags.
